generation_advancement_assessment.basis: Held-out subset-sweep validation metrics only; feature-combo fit on the training split is not used.

stage_summaries.description: Single-pass fast ET prescreen across all requested combos
Deeper ET rerank of prescreen survivors
Full-depth RF + ET evaluation on the strongest finalists

split_summary.grouping_note: Grouping prefers trial_id over session_id so start/steady/arc sections from one trial stay together.
